overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V showing a yellow vehicle driving through a sunny urban commercial district with palm-lined streets, passing intersections and stopping at a red traffic light behind a black SUV.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with palm tree boulevard

events.description: accelerating from stop through green traffic light
passing military truck waiting on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving through the green light at the intersection and accelerating to cruising speed

notable_agents.action: olive green military truck stopped at the intersection on the left side

entered.detail: tall modern white office building with vertical striping on the facade
row of tall palm trees lining the left side of the street
large olive green military transport truck parked at the intersection
overhead traffic signal showing green light

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a sunlit urban intersection with a tall modern office tower visible on the right. The vehicle accelerates through the green light, passing a military truck waiting on the left, with palm trees lining the boulevard.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial avenue with storefronts and billboards

events.description: red compact car overtakes on the right side in the adjacent lane

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed down the multi-lane commercial avenue

notable_agents.action: red compact car driving in the right lane and passing by

entered.detail: low-rise brick commercial building with large colorful mural on the side
modern building with bank signage and glass entrance
large green advertising billboard visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Cruising down the commercial avenue, the vehicle passes various storefronts including a building with a large mural. A red compact car overtakes on the right side while palm trees continue to line the street. The tall office tower from the previous segment disappears from view.

events.description: traffic light ahead changes to red, requiring vehicle to stop
coming to a complete stop behind the black SUV at the red light

agents.ego_description: slowing down and coming to a complete stop at the red traffic light behind the black SUV

notable_agents.action: black SUV stopped at the red traffic light directly ahead

entered.detail: black sport utility vehicle stopped at the traffic light ahead
gas station canopy and pumps visible on the right corner

segments.scene_description: Approaching the next intersection, the vehicle slows down as the traffic light turns red. The camera comes to a stop behind a black SUV waiting at the light, with a gas station visible on the right corner and the green billboard now closer on the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit commercial district as a vehicle travels from a modern intersection toward a stop at a busy city crossing. It begins by accelerating through a green light past a military truck and a tall office tower, with palm trees lining the boulevard. As the vehicle cruises down the avenue, the tower fades from view and the scenery shifts to a series of storefronts and a large mural, while a red compact car briefly overtakes on the right. The scene then slows as the vehicle approaches the next intersection, where the environment opens up to reveal a gas station and a green billboard. Finally, the camera comes to a complete halt behind a black SUV waiting at a red traffic light.
